entries.source: "Is social media harmful?"
entries.value: "Ṣé mídíà awujọ léwu?"

entries.source: "Is space exploration worth it?"
entries.value: "Ṣé ìṣàwárí òfurufú worth ó?"

entries.source: "Should homework exist?"
entries.value: "Yẹ kí iṣẹ́ ilé exist?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate any topic on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò fún lílo Jiyàn lórí Kókó Eyikeyii lórí inspir fún ẹ̀kọ́ àríyànjiyàn, pẹ̀lú àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́, àti àwọn ìwà AI tó ní ààbò síi.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Lágbára síi ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Olùkọ́ Àríyànjiyàn AI fún Àwọn Àríyànjiyàn Tó Mú jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Yan eyikeyii kókó àti go head-to-head nínú gidi àríyànjiyàn. yan side, gba challenged, àti kọ́ láti ṣe dára síi àwọn àríyànjiyàn.

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments: practical guide
entries.value: Olùkọ́ Àríyànjiyàn AI fún Àwọn Àríyànjiyàn Tó Mú: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI olùkọ́

entries.source: Answer counterarguments.
entries.value: Ìdáhùn àwọn àríyànjiyàn ìdáhùn.

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Àríyànjiyàn

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Béèrè fún small àkọ́kọ́ ìgbésẹ̀ dípò ìdáhùn ìkẹyìn.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Béèrè AI láti ṣàyẹ̀wò tirẹ ìrònú, kì í ṣe kan èsì.

entries.source: Choose a side.
entries.value: Yan side.

entries.source: Debate any topic
entries.value: Jiyàn lórí ọ̀rọ̀ èyíkéyìí

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish nípasẹ̀ kíkọ èrò back láti ìrántí.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Àwọn ìbéèrè láti gbìmọ̀ wò

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate any topic. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Explain My Answer. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ taara ipo ní àríyànjiyàn eyikeyii kókó. bí ìwọ fẹ́ neighboring ẹ̀kọ́ fọ́ọ̀mù, gbìyànjú ṣàlàyé mi ìdáhùn. fún gbooro síi ìwòye ti pẹpẹ, ka kí AI ẹ̀kọ́ alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yẹ kí ṣe fún gbogbo ènìyàn.

entries.source: Strengthen weak claims.
entries.value: Strengthen aláìlera àwọn ẹ̀sùn ìdájọ́.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́, àwọn oníjà-ìjiyàn, àwọn òǹkọ̀wé, àti àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tó ní ìfẹ́-ọkàn láti ní ìrònú tó lágbára.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell ipo kí ìwọ jẹ́ trying láti kọ́ tàbí produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Yẹn ìyàtọ̀ fi hàn up nínú ìṣàn. Instead ti one giant ìdáhùn, tó dára jù àwọn ìpàdé lọ nípasẹ̀ ìyípo: set àfojúsùn, gbìyànjú ohun kan, gba ìdáhùn, túnṣe aláìlera spot, àti yan tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Yẹn focus ṣe pàtàkì. general chatbot lè ìdáhùn fẹ́rẹ̀ẹ́ anything, ṣùgbọ́n ẹ̀kọ́ ipo gives ìjíròrò shape. ó nudges ìwọ toward irú ti thinking, adaṣe, ìdáhùn, tàbí ìṣàwárí yẹn ràn lọ́wọ́ èrò stick.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Olùkọ́ náà máa ń gbé àtakò tó lágbára wá ní ẹ̀kan ṣoṣo ó sì máa ń tọpa àwọn ẹ̀rí tó ṣe pàtàkì.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Yìí jẹ́ kan náà ìṣe àṣà lẹ́yìn studying pẹ̀lú AI láìsí jìyà ara rẹ: pa mọ́ akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ active. AI jẹ́ jù wúlò nígbà tí ó gives ìwọ ìdáhùn lórí tirẹ thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Yìí ipo jẹ́ pàápàá wúlò fún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta fẹ́ láti:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Gbìmọ̀ wò ìgbésẹ̀ ní ọ̀rọ̀ tirẹ.

entries.source: Use Debate any topic when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Lo Jiyàn lórí Kókó Eyikeyii nígbà tí Ìwọ fẹ́ ìpàdé yẹn bẹ̀rẹ̀ yarayara ṣùgbọ́n síbẹ̀ adapts láti ìwọ. àkọ́kọ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe láti sound impressive. àkọ́kọ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ láti ṣe tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀ feel ṣeé ṣe.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Kí yìí ipo ń ràn lọ́wọ́ pẹ̀lú

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ibo láti go tó kàn

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ìwọ lè pẹ̀lú bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú àkọ́kọ́ ẹ̀dà ti tirẹ gidi ìṣòro. rúdurùdu àkọ́kọ́ ìbéèrè jẹ́ fine. ìpàdé lè clarify ìpele, olùgbọ́, àkókò ipari, àti style once ìwọ begin.
